abilities.name: Invitation
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your deck for any 1 Pokemon, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward. This power can't be used if Nidoqueen is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Vengeance
attacks.text: Does 40 damage plus 10 more damage for each Pokemon in your discard pile. You can't add more than 60 damage in this way.

tests.name: invitation_search_deck
tests.description: Test that Invitation can search deck for any Pokemon

tests.name: invitation_blocked_by_special_condition
tests.description: Test that Invitation is blocked when affected by Special Condition

tests.name: vengeance_bonus_damage
tests.description: Test that Vengeance adds +10 per Pokemon in discard

tests.name: vengeance_max_60_bonus
tests.description: Test that Vengeance bonus caps at +60
